message.content: ```plantuml @startuml title Fabric Private Chaincode - Enclave registry - Current approach actor Admin participant "ECC" as ECC participant "ERCC" as ERCC actor "IAS" as IAS participant "Orderer" as Orderer participant "Peers" as Peers note right of Peers Drawbacks - Single-endorser policy only + Custom validation at every peer - ERCC must contact IAS (Internet connection and IAS credentials needed) - Current impl: No way to securely pass credentials to ERCC only - for EPID attestation SPID is needed when quote is created (ECC must provide this) end note frame "instantiation" { Admin -> ECC: install Admin -> ECC: instantiate (expected_mrenclave) activate ECC ECC -> ECC: putState(ecc.MRENCLAVE, expected_mrenclave) deactivate ECC ECC --> Admin: success / error } Admin -> Orderer: submit instantiate transaction Orderer -> Peers: when next block ready Orderer -> Peers: broadcast block activate Peers Peers -> Peers: Validation deactivate Peers frame "register new enclave" { Admin -> ECC: setup activate ECC ECC -> ECC_Enclave: create activate ECC_Enclave ECC -> ECC_Enclave: getQuote(SPID) ECC_Enclave --> ECC: quote, ECC_s_pk deactivate ECC_Enclave ECC -> ERCC: register(quote, ECC_s_pk) activate ERCC ERCC -> IAS: send quote activate IAS IAS --> ERCC: Attestation deactivate IAS ERCC -> ERCC: putState(ercc.ECC_s_pk, Attestation) deactivate ERCC ERCC --> ECC: success / error deactivate ECC ECC --> Admin: success / error } Admin -> Orderer: submit setup transaction Orderer -> Peers: when next block ready frame "register validation" { Orderer -> Peers: broadcast block activate Peers Peers -> Peers: Normal validation Peers -> ERCC_VSCC: Custom ERCC validation activate ERCC_VSCC ERCC_VSCC -> ERCC_VSCC: expected_mrenclave = getState(ecc.MRENCLAVE) ERCC_VSCC -> ERCC_VSCC: check attestation signature ERCC_VSCC -> ERCC_VSCC: check attestation ECC_s_pk and mrenclave deactivate ERCC_VSCC deactivate Peers } @enduml ```
